sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Excess Expenditure Appropriation [No. 6 of 2009 39
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 6 of 2009
Date of Assent: 31st March, 2009
An Act to approve the excess expenditure of moneys
aggregating nine billion, three hundred and fifty nine
million, one hundred and fifty one thousand, nine hundred
and forty seven kwacha required for the services of the
Republic during the financial year ended on 31st
December, 2006.
[3rd April, 2009
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. Enactment
This Act may be cited as the Excess Expenditure Short title
Appropriation (2006) Act, 2009.
The expenditure on the services of the Republic during the Excess
financial year which ended on 31st December, 2006, of the moneys expenditure
approval
indicated in respect of the services in the third column of the
Schedule, being expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated
for the services by the Appropriation Act, 2006, and the
Act No.17
Supplementary Appropriation (2006) Act, 2008, is hereby approved. of 2006
Copies of this Act can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K1,000 each.
